data.body:
OVERLAY CATALOG — database / migrations / SQL
- Source: strong_migrations (MIT; unsafe-op->safe-rewrite), Atlas lint analyzers (Apache; 50+ DB-aware), django-migration-linter (Apache; reversibility), sqlfluff (MIT; STYLE only not safety); CodeRabbit migration checks = behavior benchmark.
- 7 dimensions: D1 destructive/irreversible (DROP; rename-as-destructive; lossy type change); D2 locking/zero-downtime (non-CONCURRENTLY index; NOT NULL+default rewrite; validating constraint scan -> NOT VALID then VALIDATE); D3 index correctness/query perf; D4 backfill/data-migration safety (batched; fail-on-existing-rows); D5 reversibility (down-migrations; RunSQL/RunPython reverse); D6 transaction safety (CONCURRENTLY-in-txn illegal; lock/statement timeout); D7 backward-compat/expand-contract. Optional D8 type hygiene.
- Triggers: migrations/migrate/alembic/db-migrate/Flyway/Liquibase/prisma-migrations/drizzle/goose globs + *.sql (scope-gated) + schema files.
- HIGH-VALUE escalation: ORM model changed but NO migration file present (missing-migration).
- LICENSE FLAG: Squawk packages GPL-3.0 -> factual cross-check only; source wording from strong_migrations/Atlas/django-migration-linter (permissive equivalents exist). pt-osc GPL-2.0 (rationale only). Not blocked.
